creator: otacilio.neto@bsd.com.br
text:
After um make install on math/R with options to use flang a build and install of devel/flang-clang starts. Build runs ok, but install fails with this message:

-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/include/clang-c/Documentation.h
-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/include/clang-c/Index.h
-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/include/clang-c/Platform.h
-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/lib/cmake/clang/ClangTargets.cmake
-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/lib/cmake/clang/ClangTargets-release.cmake
-- Up-to-date: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage/usr/local/flang/lib/cmake/clang/ClangConfig.cmake
gzip: can't stat: /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang/work/stage//usr/local/flang/man/man1/scan-build.1: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[4]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/flang-clang
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[3]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/flang
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[2]: stopped in /usr/ports/devel/flang
*** Error code 1
